items.title: Swiss voters reject 10 million population cap
items.summary: Nearly 55% of participants voted against the proposal to cap population by cutting migration, results show.

items.title: Teen shot and buses torched in Manhattan after historic NBA win for Knicks

items.title: Protesters clash with police ahead of G7 summit in Geneva

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 瑞士公投驚險否決！1000萬人口上限反移民爭議提案沒過關
items.summary: 瑞士當局與商業界14日暫時鬆了一口氣！瑞士選民在剛結束的公投中，以微弱優勢否決了旨在限制國家人口總量的爭議性反移民提案。此前，反對者曾嚴厲警告該提案恐將引發國家「災難性混亂」...…
